title: submission: Online Data Scheduler — unique_only + lookahead=16
author: SyntagmaNull

data.description: Online data scheduler that reorders raw training chunks using a lookahead buffer and unique-token-ratio scoring
Scheduler-backed distributed data loading with a dedicated scheduler rank

novel_contributions: Minimum-viable online data scheduler policy using lookahead buffer plus unique-token-ratio selection
Local cheap ablations showing unique_only + lookahead=16 beats random_lookahead_16 across 6/6 seed-budget cells
Real-machine first-experiment proposal contrasting baseline_full_train against 7_train_1_scheduler_unique_only_lookahead_16
Scheduler integrated into modified train_gpt.py via a dedicated scheduler rank
